zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Longford I於1285年出生在英國德比夏爾隆福德時，他的父親John de Longford25歲，母親Joan de Byron18歲。他於1301年6月與Katherine Braylesford在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年2月28日在英國斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Longford I于1285年出生在英国德比夏爾隆福德时，他的父亲John de Longford25岁，母亲Joan de Byron18岁。他于1301年6月与Katherine Braylesford在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年2月28日在英国斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Longford I was born in 1285, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, his father, John de Longford, was 25 and his mother, Joan de Byron, was 18. He married Katherine Braylesford in June 1301, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 28 February 1356, in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Longford I est né en 1285, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Longford, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan de Byron, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Braylesford en juin 1301, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 février 1356, à Ellastone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Longford I 1285 in Longford, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Longford 25 und seine Mutter Joan de Byron 18. Er hat im Juni 1301 in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Braylesford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1356 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Longford I è nato il nel 1285 nel Longford, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, John de Longford, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Byron, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Braylesford nel giugno 1301, nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 28 febbraio 1356, nel Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Longford Iが1285年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで生まれた時，父John de Longfordは25歳，母Joan de Byronは18歳であった。1301年6月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードでKatherine Braylesfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年2月28日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエラストーンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Longford I(이)가 1285년 영국 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Longford(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Byron(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1301년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 Katherine Braylesford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 2월 28일 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘라스톤에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Longford I nasceu em 1285, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Longford, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Byron, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Braylesford em junho de 1301, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1356, em Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Longford I родился в 1285 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Longford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Byron, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Braylesford июнь 1301 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 28 февраля 1356 г. в местности элластоун, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Longford I nació en 1285, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Longford, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan de Byron, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Katherine Braylesford en junio de 1301, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1356, en Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
